h793d4c60gbde5g4bfag80b6g2d478477ea03: A sage choice - Astarion's skills serve us well.
h41d81778g32bag4fd5gba38g8421ecb3d3b1: A pity I won't get to see him dragged off by his heels, though.
hd9086687g4ddeg4770gbc9bg7b99013dd2fc: I'm standing right here, you know.
hae4b7ad2g6c69g447fgbdc3g2373993a0000: It's best he stays with us, where we can keep an eye on him.
h0ff32c8dg039ag4748g9cbdg2fe0657b1542: And where we can bisect him, should his tastes turn to gith blood.
h1ccdfd49g653fg48ccga977g16c5d02d39db: I'd have gladly turned you over, if the hunter sought you, Lae'zel.
hc4062736g8b3eg4477g9dacge3c00589d918: And I'd slice you sideways if you so much as tried.
h8de7c420g60f6g473dg8fafgb92d67e18ba1: Yet your nerve delights me. And I must say - very little delights me.
h91bbed25g24a2g4f52gb0fdge0ecb856ca3b: Astarion is a friend. We owe him our loyalty.
ha3ed4f0agcedeg4190g9f8fgc9d2311e4f01: Astarion is not a friend. He is a tool, nothing more.
h773e52ecg53cdg4b21ga225g0f0d9918323c: If he outlives his usefulness, you can dispose of him as you wish.
